nation: Chippewas of the Thames First Nation
economic_notes: Development Corporation operates solar farms (4 solar installations). Investment in Garden Variety cannabis retail stores in Manitoba (6.5% ownership in 10552763 Canada Corp). Green Lane landfill revenue share agreement with City of Toronto (40% of tonnage royalties). Big Bear Creek Trust assets of ~$107.9M held off-balance sheet. COVID-19 subsequent event noted.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - Development Corporation financial statements for FY2019 and FY2020 were not available; DC amounts remain unchanged from March 31, 2018 audited figures. Big Bear Creek Trust was removed from consolidation in FY2020 (prior period restatement); trust holds ~$107.9M in assets off-balance sheet. Prior year figures restated for: (A) $410,640 deferred revenue reclassification, (B) removal of Big Bear Creek Trust from consolidation, (C) $235,000 accounts payable correction. Obligation under capital lease of $245,873 exists. Long-term investments of $450,690 in cannabis retail venture. isc_funding is AANDC/INAC amount only; total_government_transfers includes AANDC $8,976,285 + Health Canada $2,946,913 + Province of Ontario $2,513,158 + CMHC subsidy $340,011 + CMHC housing repair funding $321,166 + Union of Ontario Indians $718,961 + Stepping Stones $2,340,486 + Southern First Nations Secretariat $2,256,710 + OFNLP $1,492333 = approx $21,906,023 but OFNLP and SFNS may not be government transfers; conservative estimate used. OSR calculated as total revenue minus identified government transfers.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
